era: Hip-Hop. E=6 -- small-town hunger, Monroe-to-Seattle trajectory, geographic expansion. MONROE ENTERS: third non-Seattle city (after Tacoma 143, Spokane 160). E=6 streak continues (161-168). Thirty-third degree in hip-hop era (134-168). v1.49.306.

location.formative: Monroe -- small-town Snohomish County, 30 miles NE of Seattle. Cascade foothills. Population ~20,000. Highway-exit small town.
location.career: Travis Thompson. Monroe to Seattle hip-hop. Self-released. Versatile. Prolific.

members.name: Travis Thompson
members.note: Monroe, WA origin. Self-released. Versatile style. Small-town hunger.

theory_nodes.concept: Monroe enters -- third non-Seattle city of origin. Snohomish County. Small-town Washington. 30 miles NE but culturally distant. Geographic expansion from urban (Tacoma) to regional (Spokane) to small-town (Monroe).
examples: Tacoma (143): first non-Seattle. Urban. South Sound.
Spokane (160): second non-Seattle. Regional. Eastern WA.
Monroe (166): third non-Seattle. Small-town. Snohomish County.
Geographic expansion in three different modes.
theory_nodes.description: Monroe enters. Third non-Seattle. Small-town. Geographic expansion.

genealogy.relationship: Travis Thompson at 166. Monroe enters the engine.

theory_nodes.concept: Small-town-to-Seattle pipeline -- talented artists from small Washington towns migrating to Seattle for scene infrastructure. Monroe provides authenticity and hunger; Seattle provides venues, collaborators, audience.
examples: Monroe to Seattle: 30 miles, different world.
theory_nodes.description: Small-town pipeline. Monroe to Seattle. Hunger drives migration.

theory_nodes.concept: Versatile output -- introspective tracks, bangers, storytelling, melodic hooks. Wide BPM range (80-150). Not locked into a single lane. Broad ambition.
theory_nodes.description: Versatile output. Wide range. Broad ambition. Not single-lane.

cross_references.relationship: OUTSIDER STATUS! Khingz underground outsider (165). Thompson geographic outsider (166). Different kinds of distance from the scene core.
GEOGRAPHIC EXPANSION! Spokane (160). Monroe (166). Both non-Seattle. Different distances. Both required migration.
THREE NON-SEATTLE CITIES! Tacoma (urban), Spokane (regional), Monroe (small-town). Three modes of geographic expansion.
INSIDER VS OUTSIDER! Blue Scholars from Seattle core. Thompson from Monroe edge. Community template vs small-town pipeline.
